summary: Implementation reviewed against all 6 design guide criteria. Module placement is clean (schema-template.ts in lib/, no Ajv imports, single dependency on schemas-embedded). Ref resolution is correct: external refs resolve from DEFS_SCHEMA, self refs from rootSchema, transitive refs handled through recursive generation calls. Required-only filtering applied at every nesting level. Placeholder format matches spec. Conditional schema merge for --role correctly walks allOf if/then structure, verified against evidence.schema.json. Code quality is solid with reasonable defensive defaults for edge cases.
